description_long: This is a sealed bag of potato chips, specifically labeled as 'Potetgull Sourcream & Onion' by Maarud. The packaging is predominantly blue with a large, clear image of ridged potato chips on the front, suggesting the contents inside. The bag is made of a glossy, flexible plastic material, with visible crinkles and folds typical of snack packaging. The front features a prominent brown and white label with the product name, and a red rectangular logo for the brand. The bag appears partially filled, giving it a slightly flattened, pillow-like shape. There are no visible tears or openings, and the packaging is designed to be lightweight and portable for on-the-go snacking.
description: A blue, glossy plastic bag of Maarud Potetgull Sourcream & Onion potato chips, featuring a photo of chips and clear branding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bag's flattened, pillow-like shape and the blue color with part of the chip image visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full product branding, chip image, and flavor text clearly.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the bag's crinkled plastic surface and partial chip image visible.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the back of the bag and the top edge of the branding.
attribute_brand_logo: A red rectangular logo with white text 'MAARUD' is visible on the front upper section of the bag.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front of the bag clearly states 'Sourcream & Onion' and shows an image of potato chips, indicating the flavor.
